channel.title: My Experience on Nadia Zablah Humbert-Labeaumaz
channel.description: Recent content in My Experience on Nadia Zablah Humbert-Labeaumaz

item.title: Business Insights Host
item.description: Launched and hosted a discussion series exploring business and entrepreneurship, distilling practical lessons from real-world experiences while showcasing the work of social entrepreneurs.

item.title: Founder & Product Lead — Social Impact
item.description: Founded and developed a collaborative platform dedicated to harnessing collective knowledge and impact-driven innovation to address major environmental, healthcare, and societal challenges.

item.title: Executive Advisor — Strategy & Transformation
item.description: Advised executive teams at 10+ startups and SMEs across the technology, industrial, and mission-driven sectors on corporate strategy, transformation, organizational performance, and growth.

item.title: Senior Program Manager — Growth & Performance
item.description: Scaled a French startup’s engineering function internationally, improving productivity by 40%.

item.title: Head of Engineering & Transformation
item.description: Led a major SaaS platform transformation supporting a scale-up’s expansion across European markets.

item.title: Founder & Managing Director
item.description:
Founded a consulting firm helping high-growth and regulated organizations navigate strategic, organizational, operational, and technology transformations.

↪ Company Executive Profile

item.title: Technology Transformation Consultant
item.description: Led the modernization of a critical banking platform burdened by 10 years of technical debt, reducing risk and enabling long-term scalability.

item.title: Technology Community Founder & Leader
item.description:
Founded and led the Kotlin Lyon community in France, bringing together software professionals to share knowledge and advance expertise in the Kotlin programming language.

Built partnerships with local companies and industry experts to organize events and technical talks, contributing to knowledge sharing, technology adoption, and sustained community growth.

item.title: Engineering Practices Advocate
item.description:
Created a knowledge-sharing channel focused on software engineering, delivery excellence, and organizational effectiveness.

Produced educational content and shared practical insights to support continuous learning and professional development among technology professionals.

item.title: Founder — Compliance SaaS Platform
item.description: Designed and launched a SaaS platform enabling small businesses to automate billing and regulatory compliance requirements.

item.title: Program Manager — Strategic Operations
item.description: Orchestrated key initiatives for France’s nationwide Linky smart-meter rollout, coordinating 100+ cross-functional stakeholders.

item.title: Delivery Lead — Biotechnology
item.description: Led the delivery of a business-critical system supporting the release of medical diagnostic reagent batches within a highly regulated biotechnology environment.

item.title: Biotechnology Engineer — Reliability & Production Continuity
item.description: Resolved a major production challenge that had remained unsolved for 7 years, securing continuity for the manufacturing of a rare vaccine within a highly regulated pharmaceutical environment.

item.title: Social Impact Project Leader
item.description:
Led a social impact initiative in Honduras focused on improving access to education through the renovation of a local school.

Brought together volunteers, secured funding, and coordinated local stakeholders to deliver a sustainable community development project.
